Meta Investigation.action: Exports all active Meta and TikTok ad copy, including headlines, body text, and creative descriptions, across every live campaign.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides a complete, up-to-date snapshot of all running ad copy instantly, eliminating the need to manually open and review individual ads one by one.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field for specified phrases or flagged terms and compiles an exact-match list showing the ad, field, and verbatim copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces compliance risks, messaging inconsistencies, or specific phrase usage across an entire ad account in seconds rather than requiring a manual line-by-line copy audit.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the flagged results as a structured list showing each match with its exact ad, field location, and copy excerpt.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act report directly to the right person so flagged ad copy can be reviewed and corrected immediately without any additional lookup or formatting work.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is moving along strong — we currently have 53 total agents across the board, with 24 completed, 9 in progress, and 20 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the tracker itself, the existing completed agents continue running and delivering value daily, weekly, and monthly across email marketing, paid media, SEO, creator outreach, and operations. Stay tuned as the in-progress builds keep advancing — there's plenty in the pipeline to look forward to!
